whatToBring: Sheets (one king bed, one queen bed, and two twin beds)
checkoutReminders: Dishes washed and put away (or in the dishwasher running).
Towels and linens left in the laundry room.
Kayaks, paddleboards, and dock equipment secured.

eat.name: Buxton Seafood
eat.note: Local institution — fresh catch, no frills

eat.name: Orange Blossom Bakery
eat.note: Famous apple uglies — worth the detour, Buxton

see.name: Cape Hatteras Lighthouse
see.note: Tallest brick lighthouse in the US · 5 miles

see.name: Ocracoke Island
see.note: Take the free ferry from Hatteras · ferry is 45 min

doAndPlay.name: Surfing
doAndPlay.note: Multiple breaks between Frisco and Buxton

doAndPlay.name: Fishing
doAndPlay.note: Off the dock, or surf fishing along the National Seashore

doAndPlay.name: Birdwatching
doAndPlay.note: Brown pelicans, ospreys, herons are regulars
